summary: Lead accepts the planning-only M7 Beta content and quality task graph after systems_architect REVIEW and independent qa_reviewer ACCEPT. The graph covers Roadmap and acceptance-matrix M7 scope, preserves M6_GATE = PASS_WITH_LIMITS, preserves DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE, keeps required Human Gates, and modifies only allowed task/process/status/message paths. It is accepted pending PR CI, main integration, and closure before any M7 implementation starts.

tests_run.result: VALID root M7 task graph task.

After M7-TASK-GRAPH-001 moved to ACCEPTED, taskctl ready lists M7-CONTENT-LOCK-CONTRACT-001 as the first downstream READY task; lead will not start it until the graph PR is merged and the graph task is CLOSED on main.

decisions: ACCEPT M7 task graph after independent QA acceptance.
Do not start M7-CONTENT-LOCK-CONTRACT-001 until M7-TASK-GRAPH-001 is merged and closed on main.
Preserve DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE; no manual node battle implementation or M7/M8 blocking spike/research is authorized.

Preserve Human Gates for major cultural risk, formal content lock acceptance, manual playthrough acceptance, release/commercial/branding, telemetry, server/multiplayer, cloud-save implementation/accounts/secrets, arbitrary-code mods, irreversible migrations, and frozen product/platform/core changes.
risks: This acceptance covers only planning. Downstream M7 tasks must independently prove content, culture review, balance, platform, save migration, manual playthrough, and exit evidence.
requested_action: Push branch, open PR, wait for CI, merge to main, close M7-TASK-GRAPH-001, then start M7-CONTENT-LOCK-CONTRACT-001 according to the accepted graph.
